translations.en: Farmer Krill
translations.zh: 農夫克里爾

translations.en: a large, healthy-looking winged gargoyle.
translations.zh: 體格高大健壯之有翼魔像。

translations.en: The gargoyle screams, "An-bal-sil-fer! Des-lem, klep lem!"
translations.zh: 魔像嘶喊：「An-bal-sil-fer！Des-lem, klep lem！」

translations.en: The gargoyle screams, "The False Prophet! Workers, attack!"
translations.zh: 魔像嘶喊：「偽先知！工人們，攻擊！」

translations.en: "Good $T, noble $P. To be pleased by your return!"
translations.zh: 「$T好，高貴之$P。汝之歸返令吾甚悅！」

translations.en: "To note that you wear the Amulet of Submission."
translations.zh: 「注意到汝佩戴臣服護符。」

translations.en: "To admire your courage and to appreciate your sacrifice."
translations.zh: 「敬佩汝之勇氣，感激汝之犧牲。」

translations.en: "To ask your name, that I may address you in a noble manner?"
translations.zh: 「敢問汝之名諱，以便以高貴之方式稱呼汝？」

translations.en: "To greet you, $0."
"To be named Krill Us-arb-vas-lem, Krill the @Leader of Farmers."
translations.zh: 「吾名克里爾·烏斯-阿爾布-瓦斯-蘭，即農夫@Leader統帥克里爾。」

translations.en: "To @lead the @wingless ones, the worker gargoyles who tend these fields."
translations.zh: 「@lead領導@wingless無翼者，即看守這些田地的工匠魔像。」

translations.en: "To have great fortune in my @harvests!"
translations.zh: 「吾之@harvests收成一向極為豐盛！」

translations.en: "To be forced by necessity to give the @wingless ones no room for choice or @freedom."
translations.zh: 「迫於必要，對@wingless無翼者毫不給予選擇或@freedom自由之餘地。」

translations.en: "Beh Lem? To be but a child. To someday grow wings just like his father, Scholar @Valkadesh."
translations.zh: 「貝蘭？不過是個孩子。他日必如其父學者@Valkadesh一般長出翅膀。」

translations.en: "To not understand what you mean."
translations.zh: 「不明白汝之意。」

translations.en: "To admire the wisdom of Scholar Valkadesh, but to consider his @studies unseemly."
translations.zh: 「敬佩學者瓦卡德許之智慧，然認為其@studies研究不成體統。」

translations.en: "To abhor his continued study of the accursed humans!"
translations.zh: 「對其持續研究被詛咒的人類深惡痛絕！」

translations.en: The gargoyle pauses, embarrassed.
translations.zh: 魔像停頓一下，有些尷尬。

translations.en: "To mean no offense to you, $P."
translations.zh: 「無意冒犯汝，$P。」

translations.en: "To acknowledge the nobility of your sacrifice."
translations.zh: 「承認汝之犧牲之高貴。」

translations.en: "To consider you a great credit to your race!"
translations.zh: 「認為汝是汝族之莫大榮耀！」

translations.en: "To acknowledge that it may seem harsh, but to assure you that there is no other way to treat the @wingless ones."
translations.zh: 「承認此舉看似嚴苛，然向汝保證，對待@wingless無翼者別無他法。」

translations.en: "To receive good @harvests only through firm control and clear direction."
translations.zh: 「唯有嚴格管控與明確指引，方能獲得豐盛@harvests收成。」

translations.en: "To consider them valuable members of society
translations.zh: 「視之為社會之有用成員，

translations.en: who need firm control and strong @leadership."
translations.zh: 然需要嚴格管控與強力@leadership統率。」

translations.en: "To explain that they are far less intelligent than you or I."
translations.zh: 「要說明，他們的智力遠不如汝或吾。」

translations.en: "To receive bountiful harvests thanks to the efforts of my well-directed workers."
translations.zh: 「多虧吾悉心指導的工人們努力，才能獲得豐盛收成。」

translations.en: "To feed my workers far better than misguided Farmer @Nash to the east does."
translations.zh: 「吾對工人的照料遠勝東邊那個錯誤引導的@Nash農夫納許。」

translations.en: "To be ashamed that Nash lacks common sense."
translations.zh: 「為納許缺乏常識而深感羞愧。」

translations.en: "To be appalled by his uncontrolled heart and undirected mind."
translations.zh: 「對他缺乏克制之心與條理之思，吾深感震驚。」

translations.en: "To point out his unproductive fields as an example of why
translations.zh: 「以他的低產田地為例，說明何以

translations.en: the wingless ones need firm @guidance."
translations.zh: 無翼者需要嚴格的@guidance引導。」

translations.en: "To have greatly enjoyed this conversation, noble $P."
translations.zh: 「此番交談令吾深感愉快，高貴之$P。」

translations.en: "To ask what you mean by $Z?"
translations.zh: 「請問$Z是何意？」

translator_notes: 農夫克里爾與農夫納許形成對比：克里爾豐收但嚴苛，納許仁慈但低產。此為魔像社會中有翼者與無翼者階級問題的縮影。克里爾研究人類之論帶有偏見，但被玩家（偽先知）的在場搞得尷尬。
